---
title: "homework 3 rmarkdown"
author: "Sara Guefroudj"
output: html_document
---
[View this project on GitHub](https://github.com/Saraguef123/ENVS-193DS_homework-03)

# Homework set up
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(gt)
```

# Problem 1:
```{r}
#testing to see if I am doing this right
#checkign to see once more if im doing this right
```
